purpose: Central hero brain core used as structural anchor, not as readiness truth lane.
truth_rules: Core glow never means PASS or READY.
If state payload is absent, core must remain UNKNOWN-neutral.
proof_requirements: Exactly one EXPENSIVE hero layer in motion budget.
fake_green_risks: Core pulse can be mistaken as health confirmation.
accessibility_rules: State must not be encoded by color alone.
RU/EN labels must remain explicit for status tags.
change_safety: Topology hardening scope only; no final UI readiness claims.
